heading: Rules, regulations, and forms
label: 854 Rules, regulations, and forms
text: The Attorney General may at any time, make, prescribe, amend, and rescind such rules, regulations and forms as he deems necessary to carry out the provisions of this subchapter.
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of the Internal Security Act of 1950 which comprises subchapters I to III of this chapter.
